INV.description: Inverter (NOT gate): outputs the logical NOT of its input (0->1, 1->0). Built by placing 1 component(s) and making 3 named connection(s).

RELAY_NAND.description: NAND gate built from relays: outputs NOT(a AND b). Built by placing 2 component(s) and making 5 named connection(s).

AND.description: Logical AND of two inputs: outputs 1 only when both a and b are 1. Built by placing 2 component(s) and making 4 named connection(s).

OR.description: Logical OR of two inputs: outputs 1 when a or b (or both) is 1. Built by placing 3 component(s) and making 5 named connection(s).

XOR.description: Exclusive-OR (XOR) of two inputs: outputs 1 when exactly one of a, b is 1. Built by placing 3 component(s) and making 7 named connection(s).
